evals.prompt: I want to conduct jobs-to-be-done interviews for our project management app. Walk me through how.

evals.description: Triggers on opportunity solution tree request
evals.prompt: Help me build an opportunity solution tree to improve activation for our SaaS product.

evals.description: Correctly separates functional, emotional, and social job layers
evals.prompt: A user said: 'I need to track my freelance invoices so my accountant stops nagging me.' Break this into JTBD layers.

evals.description: Produces a valid JTBD statement from a scenario
evals.prompt: Write a JTBD statement for a developer who manually deploys to production every Friday and frequently causes downtime.

evals.description: Maps all four assumption categories for a given solution idea
evals.prompt: We want to add an AI writing assistant to our email client. Map the assumptions before we build.

evals.description: Designs an experiment with hypothesis, method, and kill threshold
evals.prompt: We believe users will pay $20/month for automated expense reports. Design a validation experiment.
We want to validate whether users want a collaborative editing feature. Should we build a prototype?

evals.description: Warns against asking customers what features to build
evals.prompt: I'm planning to ask users in interviews: 'What features are you missing?' Is that a good question?

assertions.value: yes, that is a good question

evals.description: Applies the correct prototype fidelity to the right assumption type
evals.prompt: We need to test whether users can complete our three-step onboarding without help. What prototype fidelity should we use?

evals.description: Synthesizes interview data into the observation-pattern-insight-implication chain
evals.prompt: I have notes from 7 interviews where 6 users said they screenshot dashboards to share with their manager. How do I turn this into a discovery insight?

evals.description: Describes a concrete dual-track discovery cadence
evals.prompt: Our team has never done continuous discovery. What should our weekly cadence look like?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent discovery frameworks
evals.prompt: How do I use the JTBD-OST Fusion Matrix to score my opportunities?
